name: ozon-rust-suite-local

tools.name: ozon.products.count
tools.description: Count products through the configured connector; real mode uses saved Ozon Seller API credentials.

tools.name: ozon.products.list
tools.description: List product summaries with a bounded limit; real mode returns official Ozon Seller API data.

tools.name: ozon.products.get
tools.description: Read one product fact pack with stable Ozon details, attributes, and image URLs.

tools.name: poster.handoff
tools.description: Build a product-grounded poster prompt and image package for OpenClaw/Codex account-based generation.

safety_rules: Read tools use the Ozon credentials saved in the local node.
Poster handoff uses OpenClaw/Codex signed-in capabilities and does not require an OpenAI API key in the local node.
Changes that could affect store data require local operator approval.
The local skill API binds to 127.0.0.1 and requires x-openclaw-token for bridge calls.
Operator-only configuration and approval actions require x-local-token.
Scheduled reads use official Ozon seller APIs with bounded intervals and limits.
No captcha bypass, anti-bot bypass, live 1688 scraping, or unattended store writes.
